response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js — raising concerns about his readiness for the core C++-centric routing tile system.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse stacks and learn new languages
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and system reliability practices
concerns: No evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development in routing or geospatial pipelines
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript, not low-latency systems or distributed data pipelines
Limited mention of OS/distributed systems concepts like fault tolerance or consistency
